name: Destroyer
description: A powerful strike that can destroy enemies.

name: Pyro
description: A fiery attack that burns enemies over time.

name: Aqua
description: A water-based attack that can douse flames and slow enemies.

name: Earthquake
description: An area-of-effect attack that damages all enemies in the vicinity.

name: Cure
description: A healing spell that restores health to the caster or an ally.
